sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57663" key="kladeute/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλᾰδ-ευτέον</orth>, <sense id="n57663.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must prune</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.5.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
